MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Community Hosing Partnership is present. Represented by Charles Byrd.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Neil McKinney is present.
Attorney Angela Poon representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of APR-16-2012 is vacated.
